---
title: "new_file.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/temp_add_repo/new_file.ts"
loc: 1
complexity: 1
logic_score: 9.82
style_score: 10.00
intel_score: 2.00
overall_score: 7.22
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 9.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 10.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 2.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
Minimal internal dependencies.

### Exports
- `start`
- `start`
